summary: Iteration 117: Comprehensive UI/UX polishing verification. All features tested and working correctly. CSS animations, skeleton loading states, card-enter animations, page transitions, dark mode, and smooth scrollbar improvements all verified.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 117 verified all UI/UX polishing changes including: 1) Dashboard loads with stat-cards and page-enter animation, 2) Sales page has skeleton loading (fast - loads quickly), summary cards with card-enter animation (6 elements), daily grouped table working, 3) Expenses page has summary cards with card-enter animation (4 elements), 4) Daily Summary page has stat cards with card-enter animation (4 elements), 5) Duplicate Report page has skeleton loading and summary cards with card-enter animation (5 elements), 6) All pages have page-enter animation class from DashboardLayout key={location.pathname}, 7) Dark mode toggle working correctly, 8) Supplier Payments page loads correctly. CSS improvements verified: smooth scrollbar styling, table hover states, focus rings, dark mode support.

1_dashboard_load.details: Dashboard loads correctly with 10 stat-cards visible, app title visible, page-enter animation applied

2_sales_page_skeleton_loading.details: Skeleton loading implemented in SalesPage.jsx lines 291-313. Loading is fast so skeleton disappears quickly.

3_sales_page_summary_cards.details: Summary bar (Grand Total, Cash, Bank, Online, Credit) renders correctly with 6 card-enter animated elements

4_sales_page_daily_table.details: Daily grouped table with expandable rows loads and functions correctly

5_sales_page_pagination.details: Pagination controls render correctly (buttons visible when needed)

6_expenses_page_summary_cards.details: Expenses summary bar with 4 card-enter animated elements (Total, Cash, Bank, Credit)

7_daily_summary_stat_cards.details: Daily Summary page with 4 card-enter animated stat cards (Total Sales, Total Expenses, Net Cash Flow, Net Profit)

8_duplicate_report_skeleton_and_cards.details: Duplicate Report page with skeleton loading and 5 card-enter animated summary cards (Total Groups, Sales, Expenses, SP, Potential Excess)

9_page_navigation_animation.details: All pages (Dashboard, Sales, Expenses, Daily Summary, Duplicate Report) have page-enter animation class applied via DashboardLayout key={location.pathname}

10_dark_mode_toggle.details: Dark mode toggle works correctly. Clicking toggle applies .dark class to root element. UI updates to dark theme with dark backgrounds, light text, styled tables and inputs.

11_supplier_payments_page.details: Supplier Payments page loads correctly showing supplier returns section and all supplier transactions table

css_improvements_verified.page_entrance_animation: fadeSlideIn keyframe animation via .page-enter class - WORKING
css_improvements_verified.card_entrance_animation: fadeScaleIn keyframe animation via .card-enter class with staggered delays (40ms per child) - WORKING
css_improvements_verified.table_hover_states: Enhanced table hover with orange tint (rgba(245, 132, 31, 0.03)) - APPLIED
css_improvements_verified.scrollbar_styling: Custom scrollbar with orange theme (6px width, rounded thumb) - APPLIED
css_improvements_verified.focus_ring: Orange focus ring (hsl(16, 83%, 51%)) with 2px offset - APPLIED
css_improvements_verified.dark_mode_support: Complete dark mode with .dark class overrides for backgrounds, text, borders, tables, inputs - WORKING
css_improvements_verified.stat_card_hover: Transform translateY(-2px) and shadow on hover - APPLIED
css_improvements_verified.button_active: Transform scale(0.98) on button active - APPLIED
css_improvements_verified.sidebar_link_hover: Transform translateX(2px) with border accent - APPLIED
